zh.Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾-素-拉-利斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cassine de Saint-Omer於1133年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯時，她的父親Guillaume de Saint-Omer49歲，母親Melisende Picquigny58歲。她和Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1175年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾-素-拉-利斯享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cassine de Saint-Omer于1133年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯时，她的父亲Guillaume de Saint-Omer49岁，母亲Melisende Picquigny58岁。她和Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1175年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾-素-拉-利斯享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cassine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Cassandra  , now also used as an independent given name.

variants.name: Cassandra
meanings: From Greek legend. Cassandra was a Trojan princess blessed with the gift of prophecy but cursed with the fate that nobody would ever believe her. She was brought back to Greece as a captive concubine by Agamemnon, but met her death at the hands of his jealous wife Clytemnestra. Although it was never generally popular, this name was in occasional use from the Middle Ages until the 18th century, and has recently been revived by parents looking to the pages of classical mythology for distinctive names.

en.lifeSummary: When Cassine de Saint-Omer was born in 1133, in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, was 49 and her mother, Melisende Picquigny, was 58. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE. She died in 1175, in Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cassine de Saint-Omer est née en 1133, à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Melisende Picquigny, avait 58 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cassine de Saint-Omer 1133 in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Saint-Omer 49 und ihre Mutter Melisende Picquigny 58. Sie hatte mit Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cassine de Saint-Omer è nata il nel 1133 nel Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Melisende Picquigny, aveva 58 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE. Morì nel 1175, nel Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cassine de Saint-Omerが1133年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Saint-Omerは49歳，母Melisende Picquignyは58歳であった。彼女はGiselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELEとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1175年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスエイアーエ-スル-ラ-リスで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cassine de Saint-Omer(이)가 1133년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Saint-Omer(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende Picquigny(은)는 58세였다. 그녀는 Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 어-수-라-리스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cassine de Saint-Omer nasceu em 1133, em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Melisende Picquigny, tinha 58 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE. Ela faleceu em 1175, em Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cassine de Saint-Omer родилась в 1133 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Saint-Omer было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Melisende Picquigny, 58. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности эире-сур-ла-лиз, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cassine de Saint-Omer nació en 1133, en Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Melisende Picquigny, tenía 58 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Giselbert D'AIRE de STRAZEELE. Murió en 1175, en Aire-sur-la-Lys, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
